I've successfully modified the `arc/cli.py` file to make the home screen more minimalist. The command reference now shows only the `/help` command, which users can use to see all available commands.

The changes:
- **Removed** lines displaying `/plan`, `/model`, `!`, and `/quit`
- **Kept** only the `/help` command line

This makes the home screen cleaner and more minimalist while still providing access to all commands through `/help`.
